MoM-Central-Security-Admins.name: MoM-Central-Security-Admins
MoM-Central-Security-Admins.description: Security and logging management for landing zone.
statements: Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to read all-resources in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage vaults in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage keys in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage logging-family in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage log-groups in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage alarms in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage stream-family in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage ons-topics in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage bastion in compartment cmp-mom-security
Allow group MoM-Central-Security-Admins to manage bastion-session in compartment cmp-mom-security
